items.title: Transient
items.description: As I strolled through Bois de la Cambre on a summer day in August, sunlight filtered through the leaves, casting dappled light that danced and flickered across the ground and branches. Shadows of the trees layered like curtains, while sharply contrasted spots of light shimmered through the forest with the rhythm of life. Using digital painting, I captured this fleeting moment of light and atmosphere in Bois de la Cambre during the summer of 2020 on my canvas.

items.title: Observational Study
items.description: This is an observational study created in 2019, using gouache as the medium. One summer afternoon, at a friend’s home, I was deeply captivated by a scene backlit by sunlight. I picked up my brush and attempted to let the forms of objects nearly disappear in the painting, replacing them with a blurred sense of space shaped by light and color. Through this exploratory approach, I completed this painting.
